questions.explanation: Subtract 2: x/4 = 3, then multiply by 4: x = 12.
Expand: 4x + 6 = x − 13. Subtract x: 3x + 6 = −13, so 3x = −19 and x = −19/3.
Expand: 6x + 12 = x − 13. Subtract x: 5x = −25, so x = −5.

questions.question_text: Solve e + e + e + e + e = 45.

questions.explanation: Expand: 3x − 6 = x + 7. Subtract x: 2x = 13, so x = 6.5.
